# PraveenTechWorld
> Practical Technology Knowledge Base

Practical technology guides, productivity tips, AI workflows, and troubleshooting solutions for students, office workers, and creators.

## Categories
- AI Tools: /category/ai-tools
- AI Workflows: /category/ai-workflows
- Productivity: /category/productivity
- Automation: /category/automation
- Windows Fixes: /category/windows-fixes
- Android Fixes: /category/android-fixes
- Privacy: /category/privacy
- Security: /category/security
- Free Software: /category/free-software
- Career Growth: /category/career-growth
